zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短期盘整偏弱，注意支撑压力
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD价格位于65.38附近，较20日均线65.86略低，显示短期承压迹象。价格波动幅度有限，24小时变化仅0.03%，表明市场处于低波动盘整阶段，短期多空力量相对均衡，但偏向空头。  

MACD为-0.365，尚未形成金叉，暗示下行动能仍存，但幅度不大。缺少RSI数据，无法精确判断超买或超卖，但结合价格与均线关系，可初步推断市场处于弱势整理区间，暂不宜激进追涨。  

短期支撑位可参考65.20-65.00区域，如跌破需关注进一步回落至64.50附近的可能性。阻力位在65.85-66.00附近，多次未突破显示短期上涨空间有限，突破后方可考虑中线多头布局。  

交易策略上，建议区间操作为主，可在支撑区尝试低多，止损设置在64.90以下；高位接近阻力区或出现MACD死叉信号时，可考虑短线减仓或短空操作。总体保持谨慎，等待趋势明朗化再加仓。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 65.38, holding near the lower portion of its recent intraday range between 65.23 and 65.65. The negligible 24-hour gain of 0.03% reflects a market lacking strong directional conviction. Price remains below the 20-period simple moving average at 65.86, suggesting short-term bearish pressure is still present despite the relatively stable price action. Unless buyers reclaim levels above the moving average, upside momentum may remain limited.

The moving average configuration indicates that recent trading activity has softened, with the market struggling to sustain higher prices. The MACD reading of -0.3653 points to negative momentum and suggests bears currently maintain a slight advantage. While the MACD signal line is unavailable, the negative MACD value alone supports a cautious outlook. The absence of RSI data limits confirmation of overbought or oversold conditions, making price structure and trend indicators more important in the current assessment.

Key support appears near the session low at 65.23, with additional downside risk emerging if that level breaks decisively. A move below support could expose the market to further weakness as short-term sellers gain confidence. On the upside, immediate resistance is located around 65.65, followed by the SMA(20) near 65.86. A sustained break above both levels would improve the technical picture and potentially attract renewed buying interest.

For traders, a cautious approach is warranted while SOL/USD remains below its 20-period moving average. Momentum-oriented participants may prefer waiting for a confirmed breakout above 65.86 before considering bullish positions. Conversely, failure to hold 65.23 could create short-term selling opportunities targeting lower support zones. Risk management remains essential, as the current narrow trading range suggests a larger directional move could develop once support or resistance is decisively breached.
